CVE-2023-43616.title: An issue was discovered in Croc through 9.6.5. A sender can cause ...
CVE-2023-43616.description: An issue was discovered in Croc through 9.6.5. A sender can cause a receiver to overwrite files during ZIP extraction.

CVE-2023-43617.title: An issue was discovered in Croc through 9.6.5. When a custom shar ...
CVE-2023-43617.description: An issue was discovered in Croc through 9.6.5. When a custom shared secret is used, the sender and receiver may divulge parts of this secret to an untrusted Relay, as part of composing a room name.

CVE-2023-43618.title: An issue was discovered in Croc through 9.6.5. The protocol requi ...
CVE-2023-43618.description: An issue was discovered in Croc through 9.6.5. The protocol requires a sender to provide its local IP addresses in cleartext via an ips? message.

CVE-2023-43619.title: An issue was discovered in Croc through 9.6.5. A sender may send  ...
CVE-2023-43619.description: An issue was discovered in Croc through 9.6.5. A sender may send dangerous new files to a receiver, such as executable content or a .ssh/authorized_keys file.

CVE-2023-43620.title: An issue was discovered in Croc through 9.6.5. A sender may place ...
CVE-2023-43620.description: An issue was discovered in Croc through 9.6.5. A sender may place ANSI or CSI escape sequences in a filename to attack the terminal device of a receiver.

CVE-2023-43621.title: An issue was discovered in Croc through 9.6.5. The shared secret, ...
CVE-2023-43621.description: An issue was discovered in Croc through 9.6.5. The shared secret, located on a command line, can be read by local users who list all processes and their arguments.
